mapper.sql: id, title, content, summary, category_id, tags, file_name, view_count, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at
id, title, summary, category_id, tags, view_count, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO knowledge (title, content, summary, category_id, tags, file_name, view_count, status, created_by, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{content}, #{summary}, #{categoryId}, #{tags}, #{fileName}, 0, 1, #{createdBy}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM knowledge WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM knowledge WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 1
SELECT title FROM knowledge WHERE status = 1 AND title LIKE CONCAT(#{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY view_count DESC LIMIT 10
mapper.update: UPDATE knowledge SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
